title: Python product runtime source generation

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to the promoted TODO item and its stated touched paths.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Workspace, planning, and memory product-specific executable runtime modules are generated target output under generated/python from IR/contracts and codegen-owned primitives; packages/command-generation/src owns only generic generator, renderer, executor, schema, freshness, and conformance machinery.
proof_expectations: uv run ruff check scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py src/agentic_workspace/contract_tooling.py
completion_criteria: Static proof rejects full Python completion while packages/command-generation/src contains product-specific executable runtime modules such as workspace_runtime_cli.py, planning_runtime_cli.py, or memory_runtime_cli.py; regenerated Python outputs provide the executable projection and black-box/Docker conformance passes.

non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Runtime projection inventory contract/schema, generated-package proof checks, contract tooling surfaces, focused tests, and planning state for this active lane.

execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check selected files.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before broadening beyond the promoted item.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated backlog, adjacent modules, or canonical contracts not named by this plan.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A correct fix requires changing the requested outcome or ownership boundary.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Implementation needs files outside the filled execution bounds.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: The selected proof cannot demonstrate the completion criteria.

execution_run.what happened: Added python_runtime_projection_inventory as a schema-backed contract, then converted planning_operation_ir_executor.py into a command-generation render_outputs artifact driven by command_package_ir python_runtime_binding.operation_executor metadata. Docker proof also exposed and fixed #982 by adding a no-git fallback for source-retirement scanning.
execution_run.scope touched: Runtime projection inventory, command_package_ir/schema binding metadata, command-generation renderer, generated planning operation executor output, generated planning package metadata projections, generated package checker Docker fallback, focused tests, and planning state.
execution_run.validations run: uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-conformance; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --conformance --require-node; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-docker-conformance --require-docker; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check selected files.
execution_run.result for continuation: planning_operation_ir_executor.py is now generated-owned and no longer blocks full completion; runtime modules and the workspace/memory operation executors remain transitional generated-output debt.
execution_run.next step: Continue with the next smallest file-level runtime projection entry, likely memory_operation_ir_executor.py or workspace_operation_ir_executor.py after checking whether handler binding metadata can represent it without copying product runtime code.

finished_run_review.follow-on decision: continue current active lane; do not archive

delegation_outcome_feedback.expected savings: read-only selection audit can run while local implementation proceeds
delegation_outcome_feedback.actual friction: worker returned after local implementation and corroborated planning_operation_ir_executor.py as the smallest next slice; it also flagged runtime output imports as a risk that remains tracked by runtime debt.
delegation_outcome_feedback.proof result: passed for planning operation executor generation slice
delegation_outcome_feedback.quality concern: Avoid converting generated/python placement into false generated ownership; worker checks smallest next artifact and proof burden.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-conformance; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --conformance --require-node; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-docker-conformance --require-docker; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check selected files.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: planning_operation_ir_executor.py appears in command-generation render_outputs, generate --check is clean, local/Docker generated Python conformance pass, and python_runtime_projection_inventory marks only that executor rendered-by-command-generation.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The slice prevents false completion and converts one operation executor file to generator ownership; it does not yet generate the remaining runtime files or workspace/memory executors.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Runtime projection debt is explicit and proof-enforced; planning_operation_ir_executor.py is generated-owned; full lane remains open.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: generate --check, static proof, local Python conformance, Node-backed conformance, Python Docker conformance, focused tests, contract tooling, structured inventory, and ruff passed

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
signals found: #982 generated Python Docker proof assumed git was installed
#980 planning handoff treated conceptual IR/contracts prose as a missing file reference
signals fixed: #982 fixed by adding a no-git fallback source-tree scan in check_generated_command_packages.py
signals routed: #980 remains open for planning handoff file-reference detection
improvement_signal_review.next owner: current #892 lane for implementation; #980 for planning handoff warning refinement

#982 generated Python Docker proof no-git fallback fixed in this slice
